craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Prepare for the real deal! Two bedroom apartment available this month at Eastern Trails Apartments Price: $1786.00/month. No Security Deposit Required Two Bedroom / One Bathroom - 875 Sq. Ft. Watch a video tour of this apartment on the Red Oak website: https://redoakproperties.com/apartment/29-capron-rd-31/#video-tourr Red Oak Flex Pricing: Let our professional leasing staff help you select the options that best meet your budget and needs from our current lease term offerings, available move-in dates and apartment availability. Our daily price quote is good for 48 hours and is subject to availability. Please call for your personal quote. Call or Text Red Oak Apartment Homes: show contact info Apartment Features: Large floor Plan Fully applianced kitchen with dishwasher and disposal Range hood with fan and light Lots of cabinet and counter space Pantry, coat and linen closets Wood style flooring in kitchen and living room A/C unit in the living room Slider to private balcony Community Amenities: Laundry room in the building Off Street parking Cats and large dogs welcome Use of outdoor pool at Milford Trails Grilling area Playground Dog Park Basketball court Beautifully maintained landscaping Storage Facility available for a nominal fee Let’s Get Started! Call or text: show contact info You choose with Red Oak’s Daily Flex Price Program where your rental price will be determined based on your choices from our available options for lease terms, move-in dates and apartment availability. Take advantage of our exclusive NO SECURITY DEPOSIT Program. At move-in you’ll place a non-refundable Lease Safeguard fee (starting at $399) on your apartment. Good credit, landlord references, criminal background check, and income qualification are required. Craigslist pricing, specials and availability are correct at the time of posting and are subject to change at any time. Please call to verify and receive a quote that fits your budget and timeline.
